style_name: Clean Triptych Travel Vlog Thumbnail Style
style_summary: A clean travel-vlog thumbnail system built from three vertical photographic panels, oversized lowercase white destination type, small italic travel annotations, sparse hand-drawn marks, and a soft phone-camera editorial finish.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main traveler, host, couple, group, or implied travel point of view
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: walking, posing, holding a drink, looking across the street, boarding transit, or pausing at a landmark
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: unbranded drink, pastry, camera, tote bag, transit card, ticket, map, sunglasses, or travel snack
environment_variables.LOCATION: destination city, neighborhood, street route, cafe, station, park, landmark, waterfront, or theme-park-like attraction
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: three clean photo panels: close-up lifestyle panel, city-stroll panel, and landmark or scenic panel
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small vlog subtitle, day count, panel captions, and short handwritten-feeling notes
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: tiny hand-drawn heart, underline, sparkle, bracket, dash, or loose corner mark
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: simple travel outfit, dark coat, clean casual layers, neutral citywear, sunglasses, tote, or camera strap
environment_variables.ASPECT_RATIO: 9:16 vertical social thumbnail or 16:9 horizontal video thumbnail

style_fidelity_anchors: Preserve the core visual identity: A clean travel-vlog thumbnail system built from three vertical photographic panels, oversized lowercase white destination type, small italic travel annotations, sparse hand-drawn marks, and a soft phone-camera editorial finish.
Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS to control secondary scene details, textures, signage, props, and environmental cues.
Use a clean three-panel travel-vlog thumbnail composition.
Divide the frame into three equal vertical photographic panels with hard edges and no visible border.
Place a huge lowercase destination headline in pure white across the center of the whole image, crossing all three panels.
Use an extra-bold rounded geometric sans-serif, smooth and friendly, with no outline and minimal shadow.
Keep the photo treatment warm, candid, soft, lightly grainy, and phone-camera realistic.

Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, readable real brand logo, brand name, celebrity likeness, cluttered sticker collage, scrapbook overload, neon poster, grunge texture, luxury travel ad, corporate brochure, colorful headline, heavy drop shadow, outlined text, illegible destination text, plain single-photo background, and dark muddy image.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: A clean travel-vlog thumbnail system built from three vertical photographic panels, oversized lowercase white destination type, small italic travel annotations, sparse hand-drawn marks, and a soft phone-camera editorial finish.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A reusable poster/image system where the subject, prop, location, text, and accent variables change while the layout grammar remains fixed.
visual_deconstruction.subject_treatment: The subject is driven by SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION, with wardrobe or visual treatment supplied by WARDROBE_STYLE.
visual_deconstruction.background_system: LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS provide the scene, texture, spatial cues, and secondary details without changing the style family.
visual_deconstruction.type_and_graphics: MAIN_TEXT, SECONDARY_TEXT, and ACCENT_SYMBOL control readable text, microcopy, stickers, marks, arrows, bursts, or other graphic accents.
visual_deconstruction.content_boundary: The negative prompt and source_content_to_avoid list prevent direct recreation of source subjects, marks, brands, watermarks, and story premises.

image_treatment.finish: finished AI-image prompt output, not a wireframe, SVG, HTML mockup, or raw storyboard note
image_treatment.texture: preserve the material, paper, grain, marker, photographic, or print texture described by the style summary and prompt_template
image_treatment.lighting: keep the lighting behavior implied by the reference style rather than replacing it with a generic cinematic look

composition.layout: Keep the subject hierarchy, crop behavior, framing, and density described by the prompt_template.
composition.subject: Use SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION as the primary visual anchor, scaled and positioned according to the style identity.
composition.scene: Use LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS for setting detail without changing the visual genre.
composition.text: Place MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT as designed graphic elements, not as long paragraphs.

typography.main_text: MAIN_TEXT should be short, legible, and visually integrated with the poster or image system.
typography.secondary_text: SECONDARY_TEXT should read as small caption, label, route note, slogan, or microcopy.
typography.style: Match the typography behavior described by the style summary and prompt_template, including scale, distortion, texture, and placement.

design_rules: Use PRODUCT_OR_PROP as the foreground object, product cue, or story-driving prop.
Use LOCATION to define the setting while keeping the style-specific crop and atmosphere.
Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS to control secondary scene details, textures, signage, props, and environmental cues.
Use a clean three-panel travel-vlog thumbnail composition.
Divide the frame into three equal vertical photographic panels with hard edges and no visible border.

Make the left panel a close-up lifestyle or cafe moment, the center panel a city-stroll scene with the traveler, and the right panel a landmark, scenic viewpoint, skyline, garden, gate, harbor, or destination proof point.
Place a huge lowercase destination headline in pure white across the center of the whole image, crossing all three panels.
do: Replace subjects, props, locations, text, and story details through examples.values.
Keep prompt_template placeholders declared in environment_variables.
Preserve the style_fidelity_anchors when adapting the JSON to a new image request.
Use short, readable text values for MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT.
prompt_template:
Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Clean Triptych Travel Vlog Thumbnail" style.

Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Location: {LOCATION}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Main headline text: "{MAIN_TEXT}".
Secondary text: "{SECONDARY_TEXT}".
Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Use a clean three-panel travel-vlog thumbnail composition. Divide the frame into three equal vertical photographic panels with hard edges and no visible border. Make the left panel a close-up lifestyle or cafe moment, the center panel a city-stroll scene with the traveler, and the right panel a landmark, scenic viewpoint, skyline, garden, gate, harbor, or destination proof point.

Place a huge lowercase destination headline in pure white across the center of the whole image, crossing all three panels. Use an extra-bold rounded geometric sans-serif, smooth and friendly, with no outline and minimal shadow. Put small italic white panel labels near the top, a small day-count line above the headline, a parenthetical vlog subtitle below it, and one tiny bottom-corner diary note.

Add only sparse white hand-drawn accent marks: a tiny heart, dash, underline, corner stroke, sparkle, or loose bracket. Keep the photo treatment warm, candid, soft, lightly grainy, and phone-camera realistic. The mood should feel modern, clean, travel-diary-like, and ready for a video thumbnail.

Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, readable real brand logo, brand name, celebrity likeness, cluttered sticker collage, scrapbook overload, neon poster, grunge texture, luxury travel ad, corporate brochure, colorful headline, heavy drop shadow, outlined text, illegible destination text, plain single-photo background, and dark muddy image.
negative_prompt: Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, readable real brand logo, brand name, celebrity likeness, cluttered sticker collage, scrapbook overload, neon poster, grunge texture, luxury travel ad, corporate brochure, colorful headline, heavy drop shadow, outlined text, illegible destination text, plain single-photo background, and dark muddy image.
